name: Crock-Pot Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Beef round steak or chuck (steak - 1 1/2 inches thick, cut into cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. If desired, use frozen corn or green beans instead of peas.
2. If the beef is lean, wipe excess moisture with an absorbent towel.
3. If the meat is fatty, brown it in a skillet to sear and remove the fat.
4. Place the beef cubes into the crock-pot.
5. Combine 1/3 cup flour with salt and pepper; toss with the beef to coat evenly.
6. Add all vegetables except tomatoes to the crock-pot and mix well.
7. In a separate bowl, combine beef broth, wine, sugar, and Kitchen Bouquet.
8. Pour the mixture over the meat and vegetables.
9. Stir carefully.
10. Add the drained tomato wedges.
11. Cover and cook on high for 4-5 1/2 hours.
12. One hour before serving, make a paste of flour and water. Add it to the mixture until thickened.
